arts.ttl: Arsenal drop early Crystal Palace team news hint as Declan Rice decision made
arts.sum: Rice, though, is the player the club featured on its official social media channels on Friday in a graphic ahead of the Palace match. William Saliba was also the focus of their matchday graphic before starting the match as a substitute and replacing Thomas Partey at half-time.

arts.ttl: Michael Owen title race prediction coming true as Man City slip further from Arsenal and Chelsea
arts.sum: Before the season began in August, he predicted the Gunners to win the Premier League with Liverpool trailing closest and Villa behind them. The relentless nature of Guardiola's team in recent years made such a suggestion seem wild, but goals from Jhon Duran and Morgan Rogers at Villa Park this lunchtime have left them sixth with 27 points - two points shy of what is currently required to make the Champions League qualification spots - by Christmas.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal are wearing black armbands during Premier League clash against Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Arsenal will be wearing black armbands during their Premier League meeting with Crystal Palace on Saturday evening as the club pays tribute to former player George Eastham. The Gunners had made a request to the Premier League for Mikel Arteta's team wear black armbands in remembrance for today's game at Selhurst Park, which was subsequently approved.

arts.ttl: Sarr fires Palace level with superb strike!
arts.sum: Crystal Palace find the equaliser against Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Follow live: Arsenal look to boost title hopes with win at Palace
arts.sum: Three days after beating Crystal Palace in the Carabao Cup, Arsenal face Oliver Glasner's side in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka Reaches Historic Arsenal Milestone
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka made his 250th appearance for Arsenal on Saturday afternoon in the team's Premier League match away at Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Gallery: Palace face Arsenal again at Selhurst
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are facing Arsenal for the second time in three days at Selhurst Park this afternoon – enjoy the best photos from SE25 in our LIVE gallery below!

arts.ttl: Three changes for Palace for Arsenal rematch
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has made three changes to his Crystal Palace starting XI, as the Eagles face Arsenal for the second time this week.

arts.ttl: Emile Smith Rowe needs just one word to describe Mikel Arteta after Arsenal exit
arts.sum: Emile Smith Rowe has described Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta with one word, having left the club over the summer to join Fulham over the summer after struggling for gametime
